learn.core_idea: Page faults happen when a referenced virtual page is not resident in physical memory.
learn.worked_example: First touches to unique pages fault; repeated touch may hit if page still resident.
common_mistakes: Counting accesses instead of unique pressure points.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can count not-present faults from sequence.
I can map fault to access order.
I can verify with memory fault counters.
